articles.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
articles.content: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."
articles.titleZh: 杀死受Skiff影响的电子邮件应用程序的概念，因为大多数用户使用人工智能代理
articles.contentZh: 概念是“全力以赴使用代理来运行您的收件箱。”

articles.title: One-two punch delivered in global operation disrupts cybercrime "assembly line"
articles.content: "Operation Endgame" simultaneously disrupts two widely used crime tools.
articles.titleZh: 在全球运营中交付的两拳颠覆了网络犯罪“装配线”
articles.contentZh: “结局行动”同时扰乱了两种广泛使用的犯罪工具。

articles.title: White House drastically shortens deadline for dropping quantum-vulnerable crypto
articles.content: Order warns of national security risks if post-quantum cryptography isn't adopted in time.
articles.titleZh: 白宫大幅缩短放弃易受量子攻击的加密货币的截止日期
articles.contentZh: 如果未及时采用后量子加密技术，命令将警告国家安全风险。

articles.title: Oracle’s 21,000 layoffs help drive its debt-fueled AI investments
articles.content: Oracle is spending billions on data center infrastructure to support AI.
articles.titleZh: 甲骨文的21,000次裁员有助于推动其以债务为动力的人工智能投资
articles.contentZh: 甲骨文正在花费数十亿美元用于数据中心基础设施，以支持人工智能。

articles.title: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
articles.content: China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags behind models from Anthropic and OpenAI in other, more general tasks, it seems that China has dramatically reduced the gap in the capabilities between its models and those of […]
articles.titleZh: 中国的Z.ai声称它可以在网络安全方面与神话相匹配
articles.contentZh: 中国的Zhipu AI （ Z.ai ）发布了其开放式权重GLM-5.2 ，一些研究人员声称它在某些错误发现和网络安全场景中与Mythos相匹配。虽然GLM在其他更一般的任务上落后于Anthropic和OpenAI的模型，但中国似乎已经大大缩小了其模型与[…]模型之间的能力差距。

articles.title: Suno launches Spark incubator program to feed independent artists to its AI machine
articles.content: Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. Spark is their new incubator program for independent artists that provides grants, mentorship, and marketing support. To apply, artists need to be an unsigned singer, songwriter, or […]
articles.titleZh: Suno推出Spark孵化器计划，为独立艺术家提供人工智能机器
articles.contentZh: Suno的野心不仅仅是成为一个玩具来制造人工智能，它还希望成为一个流媒体目的地，并打破新的艺术家。Spark是他们面向独立艺术家的新孵化器计划，提供资助、指导和营销支持。要申请，艺术家必须是未签名的歌手、词曲作者或[…]
